title: TraderFrame — Evidence Gate
objective: Create a reduced-motion interactive cinematic experience that demonstrates TraderFrame's evidence-first decision process.
core_message: Market conviction becomes credible when evidence is filtered, challenged, approved and recorded transparently.
product: TraderFrame — A private trading decision-intelligence experience that transforms fragmented market evidence into explainable, risk-aware decisions.

storyboard.description: A visual representation of fragmented market data — news clips, charts, trade flows, social sentiment — all floating in a chaotic, dimly lit space. The camera slowly pans across the data, emphasizing the noise and lack of clarity.
storyboard.motion: Reduced motion: slow pan, no zoom, no animation.
storyboard.sound: Ambient noise with low-frequency hum, representing market noise.
storyboard.interaction: User can click on any data point to reveal a brief summary, but no action is taken.

storyboard.description: A central gate appears, glowing with a soft blue light. It is labeled 'Evidence Gate.' The gate is a visual metaphor for the decision-making process. The camera slowly approaches it.
storyboard.motion: Reduced motion: slow approach, no animation.
storyboard.sound: Soft chime, signaling the start of the process.
storyboard.interaction: User can click on the gate to initiate the process.

storyboard.description: The gate opens, revealing a transparent interface. Data points are filtered through a series of logical steps: relevance, credibility, and timeliness. Each data point is visually tagged and categorized.
storyboard.motion: Reduced motion: static interface with subtle transitions between categories.
storyboard.sound: Subtle data processing sounds, like a soft 'click' for each filter step.
storyboard.interaction: User can select a filter category to view the filtered data.

storyboard.description: A panel appears, displaying a challenge mechanism. Users can question the credibility of a data point, and the system responds with counter-evidence or sources. A visual 'challenge' icon appears next to each point.
storyboard.motion: Reduced motion: static panel with icons, no animation.
storyboard.sound: Soft 'ding' for each challenge, with a brief pause for user response.
storyboard.interaction: User can click on a challenge icon to view supporting or refuting evidence.

storyboard.description: The filtered and challenged data is now marked as 'approved.' A final confirmation panel appears, showing the approved evidence, along with a risk assessment. The user can choose to record the decision in a secure log.
storyboard.motion: Reduced motion: static confirmation panel, no animation.
storyboard.sound: Soft 'confirmation' chime and a brief tone for recording.
storyboard.interaction: User can click to record the decision or view the risk summary.

storyboard.description: The final screen shows a clean, structured decision summary. The user has full control over the outcome, with a clear risk-aware message. The screen fades to a calm, precise closing message: 'Evidence First. Decisions Made.'
storyboard.motion: Reduced motion: fade-in and fade-out, no animation.
storyboard.sound: Soft, calm ambient tone, signaling the end of the process.
storyboard.interaction: No interaction required; the experience ends.

technical_notes.interactivity: User can select, filter, challenge, and record evidence at each stage
technical_notes.accessibility: Keyboard navigation and screen reader compatibility
technical_notes.branding: Visual identity consistent with TraderFrame's brand: clean, precise, and evidence-based
